all_evidence_to_watch: Track issuer disclosures, exchange renegotiations, wallet incentives, reserve-income take rates, and new stablecoin launch terms.
Track Coinbase filings, USDC agreement language, and management commentary on revenue share.
Track merchant adoption, wallet payout incentives, and reserve-yield distribution terms.
content_sha256_covers: For wow_packet_v0.2, sha256 over canonical JSON raw_packet_json with sorted keys. It does not cover rendered HTML, proof panels, manifests, raw email text, or OpenTimestamp status.
evidence_to_watch: Track issuer disclosures, exchange renegotiations, wallet incentives, reserve-income take rates, and new stablecoin launch terms.

wow_items_json.claim: Reserve-yield sharing may shift from selective distribution weapon to industry baseline.
wow_items_json.evidence_to_watch: Track issuer disclosures, exchange renegotiations, wallet incentives, reserve-income take rates, and new stablecoin launch terms.
wow_items_json.observation: Reserve-yield sharing may shift from selective distribution weapon to industry baseline.
wow_items_json.why_now: The market is debating whether stablecoin issuer margins are durable or structurally compressing.
wow_items_json.why_worth_watching: Reserve-yield sharing may shift from selective distribution weapon to industry baseline.

wow_items_json.claim: Coinbase-linked stablecoin economics may be more sensitive to partner take-rate renegotiation than headline supply growth.
wow_items_json.evidence_to_watch: Track Coinbase filings, USDC agreement language, and management commentary on revenue share.
wow_items_json.observation: Coinbase-linked stablecoin economics may be more sensitive to partner take-rate renegotiation than headline supply growth.
wow_items_json.why_now: Public-market discussion is shifting from circulation to revenue rights.
wow_items_json.why_worth_watching: Coinbase-linked stablecoin economics may be more sensitive to partner take-rate renegotiation than headline supply growth.

wow_items_json.claim: Payment platforms may compete on who captures reserve income instead of who owns the customer interface.
wow_items_json.evidence_to_watch: Track merchant adoption, wallet payout incentives, and reserve-yield distribution terms.
wow_items_json.observation: Payment platforms may compete on who captures reserve income instead of who owns the customer interface.
wow_items_json.why_now: Stablecoin economics are becoming an infrastructure pricing question.
wow_items_json.why_worth_watching: Payment platforms may compete on who captures reserve income instead of who owns the customer interface.
